contractor_pricing_source: Preliminary estimates from 3 local hospitality contractors in BCS region, reviewed against hospitality construction cost benchmarks (MXN per sqm for boutique hotel category)
recommendation_notes: Client budget of $3.5M USD (~MXN 60.2M) is 74.4% below preliminary contractor estimates of MXN 105M for the full 3,000 sqm program with solar, greywater, and AV systems. This variance significantly exceeds the 25% escalation threshold. Recommended options for Marcela's review: (1) value engineer the program — phase construction starting with core casitas and F&B, deferring spa expansion; (2) revisit budget assumptions with client — the wellness hotel market in Todos Santos may support higher investment; (3) reduce program scope to match budget constraints. Contractor estimates are consistent across all 3 bidders, indicating the variance reflects program complexity, not pricing outliers.
